  • Classes in nonprofitbookkeeping.panels used by nonprofitbookkeeping.panels
    Class
    Description
    AccountingYearPanel.SSButtonPanel
    Dummy SSButtonPanel with two buttons.
    AccountingYearPanel.SSDateChooser
    Dummy SSDateChooser implemented as a JPanel containing a JTextField.
    AccountingYearPanel.SSTableComboBox
    Dummy SSTableComboBox implemented as a JComboBox with preset items.
    ButtonPanel.Button
     
    CompanyCreatedCallback
     
    DonorsPanel.Donor
    Donor represents a donor with an ID, name, total donation amount, and last donation date.
    DonorsPanel.DonorService
    DonorService defines the API for retrieving donor data.
    GrantsPanel.Grant
    Donor-like model class representing a Grant.
    GrantsPanel.GrantsService
    GrantsService defines the API for retrieving grant data.
    PageViewer.CellEdit
    Cell editor class
    StartingAmountPanel.SSCurrencyTextField
    Dummy implementation of SSCurrencyTextField.
    StartingAmountPanel.SSTable
    Dummy implementation of SSTable used in the scroll pane.
